headline: WYNN NIGHTLIFE EMBRACES "THE YEAR OF EXCESS" WITH CINEMATIC SHORT FILM FEATURING TOP DJS
summary: Wynn Nightlife, Wynn Las Vegas' premier nightlife brand, releases "The Year of Excess," a cinematic short film conceived and produced entirely in-house. The film is an unfiltered embrace of the glamour, mayhem, and liveliness that makes Las Vegas legendary.
